name: ruby-multipart-post
title: ruby-multipart-post
summary: multipart form post accessory for Net::HTTP
description:
multipart form post accessory for Net::HTTP
Adds a streamy multipart form post capability to Net::HTTP. Also
supports other methods besides POST.
.
FEATURES/PROBLEMS:
.
* Appears to actually work. A good feature to have.
* Encapsulates posting of file/binary parts and name/value parameter parts,
similar to most browsers' file upload forms.
* Provides an UploadIO helper class to prepare IO objects for inclusion in
the params hash of the multipart post object
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-multipart-post because multipart form post accessory for Net::HTTP.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-multipart-post as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-multipart-post with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-multipart-post --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
